text: I’m engulfed by the crisp sterility of this modern hallway—cool light, sharp glass lines, the silent promise of technological progress on display behind the walls. Walking into the R+D space, I feel both curious and slightly intimidated. The bold letters and illuminated screens exude an aura of relentless innovation. There is a sense that I am standing on the threshold of ideas being born, yet also reminded of how small and transient individual understanding can feel in the presence of such systemic advancement. Wonder and humility intermingle within me.
